name: Number 26: Spaceway Octobypass
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>２６ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>元</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>孔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>路</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オクトバイパス
desc:
2 Level 3 monsters
At the start of the Battle Phase: You can detach 1 material from this card; during this Battle Phase, a player can only attack with 1 monster, and its attack(s) becomes a direct attack. You can only use this effect of "Number 26: Spaceway Octobypass" once per turn. At the end of the Damage Step, if a monster inflicted battle damage by a direct attack: Give control of the monster that attacked to the turn player's opponent.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

action: Takes control of an opponent's monster
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
attack: Prevents your opponent's monsters from attacking
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
